## Summary

Provide a clear and concise description of the feature.

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the current limitation or pain point.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this feature to work.

## Example

If applicable, provide an example of how the feature would be used.

```go
// Example usage (optional)
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Information

Include any other context, references, screenshots, or related issues that may help explain the request.
